name: Sofia Marchetti
bio: Twelve years guiding students from first breath to advanced control. Sofia's cueing is precise, calm, and rooted in classical Contrology.

name: Elena Park
bio: Specialising in prenatal and rehabilitative Pilates. Elena builds strength gently and safely, meeting every body exactly where it is.

name: Margot Voss
bio: Reformer and barre specialist with a gift for making beginners feel safe. Clear, warm, and endlessly patient.

name: James Adler
bio: Physiotherapy-trained instructor focused on injury recovery and posture. Every session is tailored to your body's needs.

name: Camille Dubois
bio: Trained in the Romana lineage of classical Pilates. Camille brings elegance and discipline to every movement.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Prenatal and postnatal specialist. Priya's grounding breathwork has carried hundreds of students through pregnancy and beyond.
